name: Signature: Sign

description.en: Review the document and confirm your signature. Your approval is permanent and tamper-proof.
description.de: Dokument prüfen und deine Signatur bestätigen. Deine Zustimmung ist dauerhaft und fälschungssicher.
description.fr: Consultez le document et confirmez votre signature. Votre validation est definitive et infalsifiable.
description.es: Revisa el documento y confirma tu firma. Tu aprobacion queda registrada de forma permanente y segura.
description.ro: Revizuieste documentul si confirma semnatura. Aprobarea ta este permanenta si nu poate fi alterata.

bot: Signs a specific signature request by ID. Query getRequest first to show the document title and hash so the user can confirm before signing.

inputs.name: Creator Email

description.en: Email of the request creator to notify.

inputs.bot: Email address of the person who created the signature request.

body.message:
{{JOAI_WALLET_ADDRESS}} has signed your document "{{REQUEST_TITLE}}".

View request: https://devnet.joai.ai/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/signature/view?id={{REQUEST_ID}}

success.en: Document signed! Your signature is permanently recorded.
success.de: Dokument unterzeichnet! Deine Signatur ist dauerhaft gespeichert.
success.fr: Document signe ! Votre signature est enregistree de facon permanente.
success.es: Documento firmado. Tu firma ha quedado registrada de forma permanente.
success.ro: Document semnat! Semnatura ta a fost inregistrata permanent.
